acceptance_criteria:
1. All five prompt/*.rs files exist
2. mod.rs re-exports submodules appropriately
3. lib.rs exports prompt module publicly
4. cargo check passes on baml-bridge crate
5. No actual logic required yet - just structure
description:
Create the new prompt module directory structure in baml-bridge crate. This establishes the home for all typed rendering machinery.

Files to create:
- crates/baml-bridge/src/prompt/mod.rs
- crates/baml-bridge/src/prompt/world.rs
- crates/baml-bridge/src/prompt/value.rs
- crates/baml-bridge/src/prompt/renderer.rs
- crates/baml-bridge/src/prompt/jinja.rs

Update crates/baml-bridge/src/lib.rs to export prompt module:
```rust
pub mod prompt;
pub use prompt::*;
```

This is foundational scaffolding - files can have minimal stub content initially.
title: Create prompt module structure in baml-bridge
